summary: Full-stack InstaChat real-time messaging app tested end-to-end. All backend endpoints (auth, users, messages, conversations, admin gating, admin endpoints) and all frontend flows (login/register, real-time messaging via WebSocket, typing indicator, online status, dark mode, emoji picker, admin gating, unauth redirect) verified working. Two-browser context test confirms WebSocket real-time delivery without refresh.
passed: POST /api/auth/register: returns user+token; rejects duplicate username (409), duplicate email (409), invalid email (422), short password (<6 chars) (422)
POST /api/auth/login: works with username AND email identifier; admin email returns role=admin
GET /api/users/search?q=bo: returns matching users excluding self
POST /api/messages: stores msg with conversation_id (sorted-ids format e.g. 'bobId::aliceId')
GET /api/conversations: returns last_message, other_user, online flag

Admin gating: non-admin (alice) on /api/admin/stats -> 403; admin on /api/admin/stats, /api/admin/conversations, /api/admin/users -> 200 with valid payload {total_users:4, total_messages:2, total_conversations:1, online_now:1}
Frontend /login: alice login by username + bob login by EMAIL both redirect to /chat
Frontend /chat: sidebar shows user profile, conversation list with bob row + last message preview + online dot
Real-time WebSocket message delivery: alice sends 'rt-154743' via Enter key, bob receives instantly without refresh across separate browser contexts
Typing indicator: when bob types, alice sees [data-testid=typing-indicator] within 4s
Online status: header on bob's view shows 'Active now' for alice (WebSocket presence working)
Seen ticks: visible double-check icons on sent messages (verified visually in screenshot)
Dark mode toggle: html class changes to 'dark' on click and applied UI-wide
Admin login (jashanpreetgamer2@gmail.com): auto-redirects to /admin, stat-users/stat-messages elements render with labels

failed.issue: The 'Made with Emergent' badge in bottom-right overlaps and intercepts pointer events for [data-testid=send-message-button] at desktop viewport 1365x768 (Playwright reports the badge's <a> subtree intercepts clicks).
failed.evidence:
Playwright click on send-message-button timed out: '

Made with Emergent

from subtree intercepts pointer events'. Workaround: pressing Enter sends the message successfully.

action_items: Optional: add bottom padding / margin to the message-input footer or z-index ordering so the Emergent badge doesn't sit on top of the send button at 1365px width. Functionality is fine via Enter key, this is a UX/click-target polish item.

success_rate.frontend: ~95% (1 minor overlay issue, all flows still functional)
